code: import React,{useState}from'react';import MessageBubble from'./MessageBubble';import agentClient from'../ag-ui/agentClient';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AGENTS=[{key:'session',label:'📅 Sessions'},{key:'faq',label:'❓ FAQ'},{key:'personalized',label:'✨ Personalized'}];const ChatWindow=()=>{const[messages,setMessages]=useState([]);const[input,setInput]=useState('');const[currentAgent,setCurrentAgent]=useState('session');const sendMessage=async()=>{if(!input.trim())return;setMessages([...messages,{sender:'user',text:input}]);const res=await agentClient(input,currentAgent);setMessages(msgs=>[...msgs,{sender:'agent',text:res}]);setInput('');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{maxWidth:500,margin:'0 auto'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',gap:8,marginBottom:12},children:AGENTS.map(agent=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setCurrentAgent(agent.key),style:{padding:'8px 16px',borderRadius:20,border:currentAgent===agent.key?'2px solid #0078d4':'1px solid #ccc',background:currentAgent===agent.key?'#e3f2fd':'#f1f1f1',fontWeight:currentAgent===agent.key?700:400,cursor:'pointer'},children:agent.label},agent.key))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{minHeight:300,border:'1px solid #ccc',padding:10,marginBottom:10},children:messages.map((msg,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MessageBubble,{sender:msg.sender,text:msg.text},i))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:input,onChange:e=>setInput(e.target.value),style:{width:'80%'}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:sendMessage,children:"Send"})]});};export default ChatWindow;
